title: Bronté  Anderson
content:
People.ContactEmail bkanderson@mccarthy.ca
Bronté recently completed her third year of the BCL/JD program at McGill University, where she was involved as submissions editor for the McGill Law and Health Review, a volunteer with the “Law Education Connexion” outreach program, and a research assistant in equity and global health. She also gained practical experience as a legal intern at Bombardier Inc. She has worked at the firm since 2025.
Before studying law, Bronté earned a Bachelor of Arts in Health Studies from the University of Toronto and a Master of Public Health from the London School of Hygiene and Tropical Medicine. She has worked in clinical research and public health at University Health Network, the World Health Organization, and Public Health Ontario.
Outside of academics and work, Bronté enjoys cooking and baking, running, musicals, singing, and playing piano.
